features.description: Content Collection 등록 + now/presentations.json 시드 + CV PDF asset + posts images dir
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && [ -f public/이규민_CV.pdf ] && [ -f src/content/config.ts ] && [ -f src/data/now.json ] && [ -f src/data/presentations.json ] && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: Nav 8 메뉴 + Software→Tools 라벨 + CmdK Sections route navigation + Base canonical/hreflang
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && grep -q "Tools" src/components/sections/Nav.astro && grep -q "rel=\"canonical\"" src/layouts/Base.astro && grep -q "/about\|/tools\|/publications" src/islands/CmdK.tsx && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: EN 6 + KO 6 콘텐츠 페이지 + posts/index + posts/[slug] + RSS + PostCard/PresentationsList/CvFull/ContactInfo 컴포넌트
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && for p in about tools publications presentations cv contact; do [ -f "src/pages/${p}.astro" ] || exit 1; [ -f "src/pages/ko/${p}.astro" ] || exit 1; done && [ -f src/pages/posts/index.astro ] && [ -f src/pages/posts/\[slug\].astro ] && [ -f src/pages/ko/posts/index.astro ] && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: posts_sync.py + GHA posts-sync.yml + Home 재구성 (Hero+Now+Latest 3) + EntryNav 삭제
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && [ -f scripts/posts_sync.py ] && [ -f .github/workflows/posts-sync.yml ] && [ -f src/components/sections/Now.astro ] && [ -f src/components/sections/Latest.astro ] && [ -f src/lib/latest.ts ] && [ ! -f src/components/sections/EntryNav.astro ] && python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open(\"scripts/posts_sync.py\").read())" && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: clean build + 14+ route 존재 검증 + dist HTML grep + posts_sync 무결성 + 보고서
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && rm -rf dist .astro && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1 && for r in / about tools publications presentations posts cv contact; do [ -f "dist${r}/index.html" ] || [ -f "dist${r}.html" ] || exit 1; done && for r in / about tools publications presentations posts cv contact; do [ -f "dist/ko${r}/index.html" ] || [ -f "dist/ko${r}.html" ] || exit 1; done && ! grep -rq "EntryNav\|kuro-demo" dist/'
